data.name: buttonReadFile1.ToolTip
data.value: Open a Rigaku R-AXIS imaging-plate image (.img/.stl) for slot 1. Loads the 2D detector pixel data used for camera-length / beam-center calibration.

data.name: buttonReadFile2.ToolTip
data.value: Open a second R-AXIS imaging-plate image (.img/.stl) for slot 2. Used together with the other images for geometric calibration.

data.name: buttonReadFile3.ToolTip
data.value: Open a third R-AXIS imaging-plate image (.img/.stl) for slot 3. Used together with the other images for geometric calibration.

data.name: button4.ToolTip
data.value: Run the calibration calculation from the loaded R-AXIS images (e.g. camera length, beam center, detector tilt). Result is plotted in the graph below.

data.name: textBoxFile1.ToolTip
data.value: Path of the R-AXIS imaging-plate image (.img/.stl) for slot 1 (Image 1). Use the adjacent Open button to browse and select the file.

data.name: textBoxFile2.ToolTip
data.value: Path of the R-AXIS imaging-plate image (.img/.stl) for slot 2 (Image 2). Use the adjacent Open button to browse and select the file.

data.name: textBoxFile3.ToolTip
data.value: Path of the R-AXIS imaging-plate image (.img/.stl) for slot 3 (Image 3). Use the adjacent Open button to browse and select the file.

data.name: label2.ToolTip
data.value: Path of the R-AXIS imaging-plate image (.img/.stl) for slot 1 (Image 1). Use the adjacent Open button to browse and select the file.

data.name: label1.ToolTip
data.value: Path of the R-AXIS imaging-plate image (.img/.stl) for slot 2 (Image 2). Use the adjacent Open button to browse and select the file.

data.name: label3.ToolTip
data.value: Path of the R-AXIS imaging-plate image (.img/.stl) for slot 3 (Image 3). Use the adjacent Open button to browse and select the file.
